mapper.insert: INSERT INTO treatment_images ( treatment_id, image_url, original_name, created_at ) VALUES ( #{treatmentId}, #{imageUrl}, #{originalName}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, treatment_id AS treatmentId, image_url AS imageUrl, original_name AS originalName, created_at AS createdAt FROM treatment_images WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, treatment_id AS treatmentId, image_url AS imageUrl, original_name AS originalName, created_at AS createdAt FROM treatment_images WHERE treatment_id = #{treatmentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT ti.id AS imageId, ti.image_url AS imageUrl, t.treatment_date AS treatmentDate, t.category AS category, t.style_name AS styleName, c.name AS customerName FROM treatment_images ti JOIN treatments t ON ti.treatment_id = t.id JOIN customers c ON t.customer_id = c.id ORDER BY t.treatment_date DESC
